<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me first check the current state

print(f"Top horizontal: {ascii_lines[17][14:56]}")

print(f"Bottom horizontal: {ascii_lines[35][14:56]}")

# Try rotating middle track red controller

print(f"\nAfter middle red:")
print(f"Top horizontal: {ascii_lines[17][14:56]}")
print(f"Middle horizontal: {ascii_lines[26][14:56]}")
print(f"Bottom horizontal: {ascii_lines[35][14:56]}")

# Check what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
after = last_transition.after_frame.ascii.split('\n')
changed = [i for i in range(64) if before[i] != after[i]]
print(f"Changed rows: {changed}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")

# Check what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
after = last_transition.after_frame.ascii.split('\n')
changed = [i for i in range(64) if before[i] != after[i]]
print(f"Changed rows: {changed}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
